ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year_of_study" INTEGER /* Year of study of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term */,
  "term_number" INTEGER /* Term number (e.g., 1 for Fall, 2 for Spring) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the term */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the term */,
  "year" TEXT /* Academic year of the term */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the term (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade achieved by the student in the course and term */,
  "grade_type" TEXT /* Type of grade (e.g., Final, Midterm) */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date the grade was recorded */,
  "grade_letter" TEXT /* Letter grade equivalent (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_courses" (
  "student_course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student-course association */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the student's enrollment (e.g., Enrolled, Dropped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_courses_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_terms" (
  "student_term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student-term association */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the student's enrollment in the term (e.g., Enrolled, Graduated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_terms_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_terms_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
column_names: Date of birth of the student
Year of study of the student
Term number (e.g., 1 for Fall, 2 for Spring)
Status of the term (e.g., Active, Completed)
Unique identifier for each grade record
Grade achieved by the student in the course and term
Letter grade equivalent (e.g., A, B, C)
Unique identifier for each student-course association
Date the student enrolled in the course
Status of the student's enrollment (e.g., Enrolled, Dropped)
Unique identifier for each student-term association
Status of the student's enrollment in the term (e.g., Enrolled, Graduated)
